name: P2P Progression — Milestone Route
description: Prerequisite route for P2P Progression, segmented into milestone episodes by the progression-router planner. Each phase closes on a quest/unlock capstone rather than an arbitrary skill number.

steps.detail: Unlocks Morytania region access. Required before Barrows and Slayer tasks there.

hints.note: start: ask about the temple to Saradomin
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Cook shrimp and anchovies at a bank-adjacent fire or range, keeping extra raw fish on hand to offset burns / Cook the page's current low-tier fish table (sardine, herring, mackerel, trout) at a bank-adjacent fire or range, stocking roughly 2.5x more raw fish than the cooked amount needed since burn rate is high at these levels / 1-tick cook poison karambwan from level 1 to skip straight to level 30 in well under ten minutes.

hints.note: Buy ~2.5x more raw fish than needed — burn rate is high at low levels [ref: Pay-to-play Cooking training s3].

methods.method: Cook the page's current low-tier fish table (sardine, herring, mackerel, trout) at a bank-adjacent fire or range, stocking roughly 2.5x more raw fish than the cooked amount needed since burn rate is high at these levels

steps.detail: Pick a method: Leather item ladder (gloves through chaps) / Gold jewellery ladder (ring, necklace, bracelet, amulet (u)) / Molten glass items (beer glass, empty candle lantern, empty oil lamp).

hints.note: Each thread spool is good for ~5 leather items — bring ~50 thread for the full 1-20 ladder [ref: Pay-to-play Crafting training s3].

methods.location: Tan cowhide into leather (e.g. at Al Kharid), then use a needle and thread to craft each successive leather item as levels allow: gloves, boots, cowl, vambraces, body, chaps.
methods.notes: Page states roughly 50 thread spools (each good for ~5 items) and 215 total leather for the whole 1-20 ladder; only per-item XP is literal, no hourly rate is given.

methods.method: Gold jewellery ladder (ring, necklace, bracelet, amulet (u))
methods.location: Craft gold bars with the matching mould at a furnace (e.g. Prifddinas or Edgeville).
methods.notes: Gold ring unlocks at 5, necklace at 6, bracelet at 7, amulet (u) at 8, all inside this band per the page's jewellery table; the page's per-hour figures use a templated assumption rather than one stated number.

methods.method: Molten glass items (beer glass, empty candle lantern, empty oil lamp)
methods.location: Blow molten glass into glassware with a glassblowing pipe.
methods.notes: Page calls this method very slow and low-attention; literal stated rates bracket the band (beer glass 30,625 xp/hr at level 1, empty oil lamp 43,750 xp/hr at level 12), but the band spans multiple table rows so no single figure applies throughout.
